name: Upstage Solar Pro 2 (Chat)
archDisplay: Dense transformer with switchable Chat / Reasoning (chain-of-thought) inference modes
note: 31B 'frontier' model billed as Korea's first; Chat mode is the fast default, Reasoning mode trades latency for accuracy on hard tasks.

results.notes: Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, GPQA Diamond, Solar Pro 2 non-reasoning/Chat mode.
Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, Humanity's Last Exam, Chat mode.
Artificial Analysis independent evaluation, IFBench, Chat mode.

verificationNotes: Confirmed real: Upstage officially released Solar Pro 2 on 2025-07-10 per Upstage's own news page byline/announcement (not the previously-guessed July 21). Confirmed 31B params, $0.15/$0.6 per-1M-token pricing, and 64K context (doubled from 32K) via Upstage pricing page and independent coverage. Fetched artificialanalysis.ai/models/solar-pro-2 directly and confirmed the Non-reasoning score of 8 literally appears there. Model is API-only/proprietary (no open weights found), consistent with 'closed' openness.
